metadata.description: Train with the right coach. Routines, tracking, and real results.

metadata.title: Forzza — Coaching that actually works
metadata.description: We connect students with certified coaches. Personalized routines, check-ins, progress, and payments in one place.

hero.headline: FORZZA
hero.body: We connect students with certified coaches. Routines, check-ins, progress, and payments in one place.
hero.disclaimer: No credit card · Free plan forever

features.headline: Everything you need to train better
features.subheadline: One platform. Students, coaches, and owners.

routines.title: Personalized routines
routines.desc: Your coach builds your plan around your goals and level. Follow it step by step with guidance.

progress.title: Measurable progress
progress.desc: Log sessions, weight, and photos. See real improvement week by week.

chat.title: Direct chat
chat.desc: Real-time feedback from your coach. Fix technique, adjust the plan.

payments.title: Secure payments
payments.desc: Mercado Pago with a 72-hour guarantee. Coaches get paid when they deliver.

offline.title: Offline-first
offline.desc: Train without a connection. Auto-sync when you're back online.

trust.title: Verified coaches
trust.desc: Real validation process. Professional credentials included.

step1.title: Pick your coach
step1.desc: Browse the marketplace, check profiles, prices, and specialties.

step2.title: Start training
step2.desc: Your coach builds your routine and gives you personalized follow-up.

step3.title: Track your progress
step3.desc: Weekly check-ins, body photos, and metrics. No excuses.

pricing.headline: Plans for students
pricing.subheadline: Start free. Upgrade whenever you want more.

coachCta.headline: Are you a coach?
coachCta.body:
Create your profile, publish your packages, and manage your students from one place.
No fixed subscription. Commission only when you sell.

footer.healthNotice: The information in Forzza is for guidance only and does not replace professional medical advice. Consult a professional before starting.

privacy.title: Privacy policy
privacy.intro: This policy describes how Forzza collects, uses, and protects your personal information. Last updated: June 22, 2026. [PENDING — legal validation]

sections.title: 1. Data controller and contact
sections.body:
The data controller is Forzza (final legal name and tax ID: [PENDING — legal validation]), domiciled in Argentina.

For inquiries or to exercise your rights, contact us at: privacidad@forzza.app. We respond within 30 business days.

Forzza's user database is in the process of registration with the Agencia de Acceso a la Información Pública (AAIP) as required by Law 25,326. [PENDING — legal validation: confirm AAIP registration and registration number]

sections.title: 2. Data we collect
sections.body:
We collect the following categories of personal data:

Identification and account: email, username, country, platform role (student/coach). Purpose: login, transactional notifications, access control.

Fitness usage data: routines, exercises, sets, reps and weights for each training session. Purpose: show your progress and allow your coach to track your evolution.

Sensitive health and fitness data (see section 3): weight, height, body fat percentage, metric notes, fitness goals, training level, body progress photos, wellness check-in responses. These data are treated with additional protections.

Coach-uploaded content (UGC): profile photo (public), AFIP/SII tax certificates (private), invoices in PDF (private), exercise videos (private), additional coach profile images (private, with restricted access). Purpose: operating the marketplace and verifying the coach's tax identity.

Coach fiscal data: CUIT/RUT, CBU/bank alias, legal entity type. Purpose: processing settlements and complying with tax obligations. Treated as high-risk patrimonial data.

Payments: amount, currency, payment status, gateway external ID. We do not store credit/debit card data — payment data is processed directly by Mercado Pago in their own secure interface.

Minors data: date of birth, responsible adult's email, parental consent timestamp. Purpose: verify age and comply with the legal requirement for parental consent for users under 18.

sections.title: 3. Sensitive health data
sections.body:
Body metrics (weight, height, body fat percentage, body composition), progress photos and wellness check-in responses are health data under article 2 of Law 25,326.

For these data:
- We require prior express and informed consent before collecting them. [PENDING — legal validation: implement granular consent, P1.4]
- They are stored on private servers with access restricted solely to you and your currently contracted active coach.
- They are not shared with third parties without your consent.
- They are not used for advertising, commercial profiling or to train artificial intelligence models.
- They are not sold under any circumstances.

sections.title: 4. Purposes of processing
sections.body:
We process your data for the following purposes:

- Service delivery (Law 25,326 art. 5 inc. a — contract performance): registration, authentication, routine delivery, progress tracking, coach communication, payment processing and subscriptions.
- Legal obligations compliance (art. 5 inc. c): coach tax verification, retention of receipts for tax periods, parental consent for minors.
- Product analytics and service improvement (with consent, P1.1 pending): anonymised usage events sent to PostHog with PII scrubbing applied.
- Error diagnostics (legitimate interest): app error stack traces sent to Sentry with personal data removed beforehand.
- Transactional communications (contract performance): payment confirmation emails, password recovery, push notifications about your workouts.

sections.title: 5. Third parties and data processors
sections.body:
We work with the following providers who process data on our behalf:

Supabase (database and storage): receives all platform data. Servers on AWS us-east-1 (United States) — international transfer. Data encrypted at rest; RLS enabled on all tables.

PostHog (product analytics): receives anonymised usage events (plan, role, country, hashed coach ID). EU server (eu.posthog.com) — international transfer to the European Union. We apply PII scrubbing before each send: email, name, date of birth, payment data, tokens and private URLs are blocked and never reach PostHog. [PENDING — legal validation: analytics consent banner, P1.1]

Sentry (error monitoring): receives error stack traces without personal data. Servers in the United States — international transfer. IP anonymised; email, name, tokens and payment data blocked by beforeSend().

Mercado Pago (payment processor): receives the data necessary to process payments in Argentina. Local operator — not an international transfer under Argentine regulations.

RevenueCat (IAP subscriptions): receives the subscription ID and user plan to manage in-app purchases on iOS/Android. Servers in the United States — international transfer. Only active for mobile purchases.

Resend (transactional email): receives only the recipient's email address to send platform emails. Servers in the United States — international transfer. Does not receive health or fiscal data.

Expo / FCM (Google) / APNs (Apple): receives the device push token and notification payload (without health data or amounts) to deliver push notifications. International transfer.

sections.title: 6. International data transfers
sections.body:
Several of our technical providers have servers outside Argentina (primarily the United States and the European Union). These transfers are necessary to operate the service.

In all cases we apply technical security measures (encryption in transit and at rest, access control, PII scrubbing before analytics and monitoring sends) to protect your data.

[PENDING — legal validation: assess whether international transfers require AAIP authorisation under Law 25,326 art. 12 and confirm whether destination countries have an adequate level of protection or whether standard contractual clauses are required.]

sections.title: 7. Retention and deletion
sections.body:
We retain your data for as long as necessary for each purpose:

- Account and usage data: while your account is active + 30 days after deletion, then automatic anonymisation.
- Progress photos and sensitive health data: until you delete them yourself + 30 days.
- Coach fiscal data (CUIT, CBU, certificates, invoices): up to 5–10 years per AFIP/SII tax obligations.
- Audit log records (financial and validation actions): permanent per legal obligation.
- Analytics events (PostHog): per the retention configured in PostHog EU.
- Error logs (Sentry): per the retention configured in Sentry.

You can request deletion of your account and all your data at any time from the profile section of the app, or by writing to privacidad@forzza.app. We execute deletion and anonymisation within a maximum of 30 days.

sections.title: 8. Your rights
sections.body:
Under Law 25,326 (Personal Data Protection of Argentina), you have the following rights over your data:

- Access: request what data we have stored about you.
- Rectification: correct inaccurate or incomplete data.
- Erasure: delete your data (subject to legal retention obligations).
- Objection: oppose the processing of your data for purposes other than those declared.

To exercise these rights, write to privacidad@forzza.app indicating your identity and the right you wish to exercise. We respond within 30 business days.

If you are not satisfied with our response, you can file a complaint with the Agencia de Acceso a la Información Pública (AAIP): www.argentina.gob.ar/aaip.

For users in California (USA): you have additional rights under CCPA/CPRA, including the right to know, the right to delete, and the right to opt-out of the sale/sharing of personal data. Forzza does not sell or share your personal data for advertising purposes. [PENDING — legal validation for US, P2.3]

For users in the European Union: you have additional rights under the GDPR, including data portability, restriction of processing, and the right to lodge a complaint with your supervisory authority. [PENDING — legal validation for EU, P2.4]

sections.title: 9. Minors under 18
sections.body:
If you are under 18, you need the express consent of your parent or legal guardian to use certain Forzza features (hiring coach packages, accessing the PRO plan).

We collect date of birth to detect whether you are a minor. If applicable, we send a consent request email to the responsible adult you indicate. The service is not available to users under 13.

Date of birth and responsible adult data are processed exclusively to comply with this legal obligation and are never shared with third parties not linked to the service.

sections.title: 10. Security
sections.body:
We implement technical and organisational measures to protect your data:

- Encryption in transit (HTTPS/TLS) and at rest on all our servers.
- Row Level Security (RLS) on the database: each user accesses only their own data.
- Private storage buckets with signed URLs with temporary access (TTL 1 hour) for progress photos, tax certificates, invoices and videos.
- PII removal before sending events to analytics (scrubPII) and before reporting errors to Sentry (beforeSend).
- Append-only audit log of all financial and validation actions.

No system is 100% infallible. If you detect any vulnerability, report it to privacidad@forzza.app.

sections.title: 11. Changes to this policy
sections.body:
We may update this privacy policy when necessary. We will notify you of material changes by email with at least 30 days' notice. The current version will always be available at forzza.app/legales/privacidad.

Date of last update: June 22, 2026.

terms.title: Terms and conditions
terms.intro: By using Forzza you accept these terms as currently in force. If you disagree, do not use the service. Last updated: June 22, 2026. [PENDING — legal validation]

sections.title: 1. Acceptance and modifications
sections.body:
By registering or using the Forzza platform (iOS/Android mobile app, website and backoffice) you accept these Terms and Conditions as currently in force.

Forzza may modify these terms. We will notify you by email with at least 30 days' notice before changes take effect. If you continue using the service after the notice, you will be deemed to have accepted the new terms. If you disagree with the modifications, you may close your account before the effective date.

sections.title: 2. Service description
sections.body:
Forzza is a marketplace platform connecting students with independent fitness coaches. It allows you to hire personalised routines, track progress, chat with your coach and manage payments.

Forzza is not an employer of coaches. Each coach is an independent professional who provides their services through the platform. Forzza acts as a technology intermediary.

Forzza does not guarantee athletic, physical or health results. Results depend on effort, consistency and each student's individual conditions. Consult a health professional before starting any training programme.

sections.title: 3. Accounts and eligibility
sections.body:
To register you must be at least 13 years old. If you are under 18, to hire coach packages or subscribe to the PRO plan you need the express consent of your parent or legal guardian.

You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your access credentials and all activity that occurs in your account. Notify us immediately of any unauthorised use at privacidad@forzza.app.

Forzza may suspend or close accounts that violate these terms, post prohibited content or engage in fraudulent activities.

sections.title: 4. PRO subscription and coach packages
sections.body:
PRO subscription: unlocks advanced tracking features and unlimited access to history. The monthly price is shown in your country's local currency (read dynamically from our configuration; not hardcoded).

Automatic renewal: the PRO subscription renews automatically at the end of each period unless you cancel it beforehand.

Cancellation:
- On iOS and Android: cancel from your account settings in the App Store or Google Play at least 24 hours before the renewal date.
- On web (Mercado Pago): cancel from your profile on the platform or by contacting soporte@forzza.app.

Refunds: refunds are governed by the policies of Apple (iOS), Google (Android) or Mercado Pago (web) depending on the purchase channel. Forzza does not process refunds directly. [PENDING — legal validation: refund policy under Consumer Protection Law 24,240]

Coach packages: personalised training packages with a coach are contracted and paid exclusively through the web via Mercado Pago. Coach packages cannot be purchased through in-app purchases (App Store / Google Play).

Commission: Forzza retains a 20% commission on each payment to the coach. This percentage is read from the country configuration and may be updated with prior notice.

PRO subscription purchase channel:
- iOS and Android: in-app purchase managed by RevenueCat / App Store / Google Play.
- Web: Mercado Pago.

sections.title: 5. User and coach-uploaded content (UGC)
sections.body:
By uploading content to Forzza (profile photos, progress photos, tax certificates, invoices, exercise videos, coach profile images or other material), you declare and warrant that:

a) You are the owner of the intellectual property rights over the content, or you have express authorisation from the rights holder to use and sublicense it.
b) The content does not infringe copyright, trademarks, image rights or any other third-party rights.
c) The content is not illegal, misleading, defamatory, obscene or violates the dignity of persons.

Licence you grant to Forzza: by uploading content you grant Forzza a non-exclusive, worldwide, royalty-free licence for the time necessary to operate the service (displaying your profile, delivering routines, processing payments, etc.). This licence ends when you delete the content or close your account, subject to legal retention periods. Forzza does not claim ownership of your content.

Prohibited content: it is not permitted to upload material that infringes third-party rights, hate content, explicit sexual material, material identifying minors without the responsible adult's consent, or any content illegal under Argentine law.

Forzza reserves the right to remove content that violates these terms.

sections.title: 6. Copyright and content takedown procedure
sections.body:
Forzza respects intellectual property rights and expects users to do the same.

If you believe that content published on Forzza infringes your copyright or other intellectual property rights, you can notify us at legal@forzza.app indicating: (a) identification of the infringing content with its exact location; (b) identification of the original work allegedly infringed; (c) a good faith statement that the use is not authorised; (d) your contact details.

Forzza will evaluate the notification and, if appropriate, will remove the content. Users who repeatedly infringe third-party rights may have their account suspended or cancelled.

[Note: the detailed operational procedure (in-product complaint channel, moderation panel, repeat-infringer policy) will be implemented in compliance backlog phase P1.5. This clause establishes the contractual framework.]

sections.title: 7. Health and disclaimer
sections.body:
Training content and routines available on Forzza are for informational and guidance purposes only. They do not constitute and do not replace the diagnosis, treatment or advice of a licensed health, nutrition or psychology professional.

Forzza does not guarantee physical, athletic or health results. Results vary according to each person's individual conditions.

Before starting any training programme, we recommend consulting a doctor or licensed health professional, especially if you have pre-existing health conditions, are pregnant or breastfeeding, or are resuming physical activity after a prolonged period of inactivity.

Coaches on Forzza are independent professionals. Forzza does not verify their licences or certifications and is not responsible for the content of their routines. Use the service at your own risk.

sections.title: 8. Limitation of liability
sections.body:
To the maximum extent permitted by Argentine law, Forzza will not be liable for indirect, incidental, special, consequential or punitive damages arising from the use or inability to use the service.

Our total liability for any claim will not exceed the amount you have paid to Forzza in the 12 months prior to the event that gave rise to the claim.

This limitation does not apply in cases of Forzza's wilful misconduct or gross negligence, nor in situations where Argentine law prohibits the limitation of liability. [PENDING — legal validation]

sections.title: 9. Governing law and jurisdiction
sections.body:
These Terms are governed by the laws of the Argentine Republic. Any dispute arising from the use of the service will be submitted to the ordinary courts of the Autonomous City of Buenos Aires, with express waiver of any other jurisdiction.

[PENDING — legal validation: arbitration clause for the US market. CAUTION: arbitration clauses are of disputed validity in consumer relationships under Law 24,240 in Argentina. Do not apply generically. Requires review by a specialist attorney before activating for US users. See backlog P2.2.]

sections.title: 10. B2B contracts (gyms and organisations) — Future
sections.body:
Conditions for contracts with gyms, sports organisations or other companies wishing to integrate Forzza into their operations will be the subject of a specific commercial agreement.

[PENDING — this section will be developed when the B2B model is activated. Not applicable in V1 of the platform.]

aiPolicy.title: Artificial intelligence policy
aiPolicy.intro: This policy describes Forzza's current and future use of artificial intelligence. Last updated: June 22, 2026. [PENDING — legal validation]

sections.title: 1. Current status: no AI in production
sections.body:
As of the date of this document, Forzza does not use artificial intelligence or machine learning systems in production to analyse, process or generate content related to your health data, body photos or personal information.

The AI body scan flag (AI_BODY_SCAN) is disabled in the platform configuration.

sections.title: 2. Planned future use
sections.body:
When we activate AI features (which will be communicated with prior notice and an update to this policy), these will be assistive and guidance-oriented in nature:

- Analysis of body progress photos to automatically estimate metrics (body composition, visual evolution).
- All AI output will be subject to human review by the coach before being communicated to the student.
- AI suggestions will be presented as indicative estimates, not medical diagnoses.

Before activating any AI feature that processes health data, we will update this policy, request additional express consent, and conduct a privacy impact assessment. [PENDING — legal validation]

sections.title: 3. What Forzza's AI will never do
sections.body:
With or without AI activation, Forzza commits that its artificial intelligence systems will never:

- Diagnose, treat, cure or prescribe medical, nutritional or mental health treatments.
- Replace the judgement of a licensed health professional.
- Guarantee physical or athletic results.
- Use your body photos, health metrics or personal data to train Forzza or third-party AI models.
- Sell or share your data for external AI training purposes.

sections.title: 4. Data used by AI
sections.body:
When AI is active, it will only process the data strictly necessary for the specific function (for example, progress photos for the body scan). Access will be limited to the account holder and their currently contracted active coach.

Data will not be transferred to third-party AI providers without your additional express consent. Any external AI provider processing health data must comply with Law 25,326 and be listed in the updated Privacy Policy. [PENDING — define AI provider if activated]

sections.title: 5. No guarantee of results
sections.body:
Estimates and suggestions generated by AI are indicative and based on statistical models. They may contain errors. They are not a substitute for the judgement of a health professional.

Forzza is not responsible for decisions made based solely on AI outputs without professional supervision.

sections.title: 6. Contact
sections.body: For inquiries about the use of AI at Forzza, write to privacidad@forzza.app.

healthDisclaimer.title: Health and fitness disclaimer
healthDisclaimer.intro: Please read this information carefully before using the service. [PENDING — legal validation]

sections.title: 1. Guidance information, not medical advice
sections.body:
All content available on Forzza (routines, training plans, exercise videos, coach suggestions, progress metrics, wellness check-ins) is for informational, educational and guidance purposes only.

This content does NOT constitute:
- Medical diagnosis or health evaluation.
- Medical treatment, prescription or advice.
- Professional nutritional or dietary advice.
- Psychological or mental health counselling.

Forzza is not a healthcare service provider.

sections.title: 2. Consult a professional before starting
sections.body:
Before starting any training programme or change in physical activity, we strongly recommend consulting a doctor or licensed health professional, especially if:

- You have cardiovascular, metabolic, joint or other chronic or acute health conditions.
- You are pregnant or breastfeeding.
- You are recovering from an injury or surgery.
- You are over 50 or resuming training after a prolonged period of inactivity.
- You have doubts about whether an exercise or load is appropriate for your current health status.

This recommendation also applies to plans designed by a coach on Forzza.

sections.title: 3. Independent coaches
sections.body:
Coaches operating on Forzza are independent professionals who provide their services through the platform. Forzza does not verify, certify or endorse the licences, certifications, academic training or specific competencies of coaches.

Forzza acts as a technology intermediary and is not responsible for the specific content of the routines, recommendations or instructions the coach provides to you. The training contract is directly between you and the coach.

sections.title: 4. No guarantee of results
sections.body:
Forzza and coaches on the platform do not guarantee physical, athletic or aesthetic results. The results of a training programme depend on multiple individual factors: genetics, nutrition, rest, adherence to the plan, pre-existing health condition, and other factors outside the control of the platform or the coach.

References to results of other users or coaches (photos, testimonials, statistics) are illustrative and do not guarantee you will achieve the same results.

sections.title: 5. Inherent risk of exercise
sections.body:
Physical exercise carries inherent risks of injury. By using Forzza and following training routines, you accept that you do so at your own risk.

If during training you feel acute pain, dizziness, difficulty breathing, chest pain or any unusual physical symptom, stop the activity immediately and consult a doctor.

sections.title: 6. Contact
sections.body: For questions about health and safety in the use of the platform, you can write to us at soporte@forzza.app.

billingProfile.empty: The student has not yet completed their billing information.
billingProfile.step1: Log in to AFIP/ARCA (Online Receipts) or your billing system.
billingProfile.step2: Issue an invoice in the name of {legal_name} ({tax_condition}, {doc_type} {doc_number}).
billingProfile.step3: For the total amount paid by the student.
billingProfile.step4: Upload the invoice in the Payments section.

avatar.errorType: File type not allowed. Use JPEG, PNG or WebP.

perfil.packagePrice: What you want to earn (you receive this)
perfil.validationPrice: Enter a price greater than zero.
perfil.commissionTooltip: The price the student sees is your net plus Forzza's {pct}% commission. It's calculated as: student price = what you want to earn ÷ 0.80. You receive exactly what you set; the student covers the commission on top.

exportData.description: You will receive a JSON file with all your data stored in Forzza (right of access).

analyticsBanner.body: We use analytics to improve Forzza. You can accept or reject at any time.

analyticsOptOut.title: Allow analytics
analyticsOptOut.description: Help us improve Forzza by sharing anonymised usage data. You can turn it off anytime.

deleteAccount.sectionDesc: Once you delete your account, all your data is permanently removed. This action cannot be undone.
deleteAccount.confirm1Title: Do you want to delete your account?
deleteAccount.confirm1Body: This will cancel your active packages, notify your students, and schedule the permanent deletion of all your data.
deleteAccount.confirm1Btn: Yes, I want to delete it
deleteAccount.confirm2Body: This is your last chance to cancel. After confirming, the process is irreversible.
deleteAccount.scheduledNotice: Your account and all your data will be deleted in 30 days. During that period it cannot be recovered.
deleteAccount.loadingBody: We are processing your request. Do not close this window.
deleteAccount.errorGeneric: Could not delete the account. If the problem persists, write to us at soporte@forzza.app.

metadata.title: Sign in — Forzza

ingresar.headline: How do you want to use Forzza?

coach.title: I'm a coach
coach.desc: Sign up or sign in to manage your students, routines, and payouts.

student.title: I'm a student
student.desc: The Forzza app for students is mobile-only. Download it for free.

download.heading: Forzza for students is a mobile app
download.body: The student experience — routines, check-ins, progress, and chat with your coach — is designed for mobile. Download the app for free.
download.qrAlt: QR code to download the Forzza app
download.testingNote: The app is in closed testing. Store listings coming soon.
